name: plugin-4-codex-control-cc
description: Plan approval and review workflow for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Plan approval and review workflow for Codex and Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: SpecRelay is a local-first workflow for human-approved plans, controlled Claude Code implementation, and independent Codex review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Hãy tạo plan cho yêu cầu của tôi, chờ tôi duyệt trước khi giao Claude Code triển khai và review kết quả.
